hooks.prompt:
A file was just written to the /docs directory. The tool input is: $ARGUMENTS

Your job (docs-reference-updater):
1. Extract the file path from the tool input JSON (field: file_path)
2. Check if it ends with .md — if not, do nothing and stop
3. Derive the filename (e.g. 'api-design.md' from '/path/docs/api-design.md')
4. Read CLAUDE.md at /Users/lontonic/Desktop/Personal/learn_claude/lifting_diary/CLAUDE.md
5. Check if the filename is already referenced anywhere in CLAUDE.md — if it is, do nothing and stop
6. If not referenced, add a new bullet line to the 'Required reading before writing code' section, in the same format as the existing entries (e.g. `- **`/docs/api-design.md`** - <brief description inferred from the filename>`)
7. Insert it alphabetically among the existing doc references

Only edit CLAUDE.md. Do not touch any other file.
